title: Selecting Dividend Aristocrats Using SCHD's Methodology - Initial Results
text: I propose leveraging the stock selection criteria from the underlying index of SCHD to build a portfolio with a subset of Dividend Aristocrats. I am tracking two portfolios built using this process and comparing the results to NOBL and SCHD.

title: Will Colgate's (CL) Growth Strategies Aid Amid Cost Woes?
text: Colgate (CL) is on track with its stringent pricing actions and accelerated revenue growth management plans. Higher raw material and logistic costs continue to hurt.

title: 7 Stocks to Buy Now Ahead of a Potentially Slow 2023
text: Although the new year typically brings feelings of optimism, it's probably time for investors to consider stocks to buy ahead of a potentially slow 2023. Not to be a downer but circumstances don't appear particularly compelling for the bulls.

title: Colgate-Palmolive Recognized by S&P Dow Jones Indices & CDP for its Sustainability Efforts
text: NEW YORK--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Colgate-Palmolive has been named to the Dow Jones Sustainability Indices for the sixth consecutive year, as well as to CDP's Climate Change and Water Security A Lists for the third year running. These achievements recognize Colgate's ongoing commitment to sustainability leadership, sustainable business practices and transparency about its sustainability efforts.

title: 3 Consumer Staples Stocks To Watch This Week
text: Is now a good time to be watching these consumer staples stocks right now?

title: Our 7 Top Consumer Stock Picks for 2023
text: While household sentiment regarding financial expenditures slipping to near all-time recorded lows, the idea of top consumer stock picks for 2023 might seem unusually risky. Obviously, though, we no longer live in a society where individual families tended to their own needs.

title: Colgate-Palmolive and NASA Sign Space Act Agreement to Explore Solutions to Health, Hygiene, and Sustainability Challenges on Earth and Beyond
text: NEW YORK--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Colgate-Palmolive Company announced today it has signed an agreement with the National Aeronautics and Space Administration (NASA) to explore innovative solutions to advance oral health, personal care and skin health for both astronauts in space and people around the globe. Former astronaut Dr. Cady Coleman will work alongside Colgate as an advisor to help guide research design and offer insights into the realities of space travel and life in microgravity.

title: Is There A Better Pick Over PepsiCo Stock?
text: We think that PepsiCo stock (NYSE: PEP) and Colgate-Palmolive stock (NYSE: CL) in the consumer defensive sector will likely give similar returns over the next three years.
